interview.description: An open-source unified data portal for metadata management, workflow orchestration, lineage analysis, and natural language intelligent query.
interview.targetUsers: Data platform teams, data engineers, and technical teams evaluating a deployable open-source data portal.

manualRevisions.reason: Replaced generated product mockup with real OpenDataWorks screenshots for workflow orchestration, lineage, and Data Studio.
Replaced product screenshots with a professional product architecture diagram covering Portal, Platform Backend, Workflow and Lineage, DataAgent, integrations, runtime, and deployment.
Replaced the HTML-built architecture layout with a standalone professional architecture image asset, using PNG in the landing page and keeping SVG as the editable source.
Simplified the architecture image into three clear layers: access layer, core capabilities, and deploy/integrate layer, with fewer words and stronger module focus.
